creator: jlmales@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 208340
Example of reduced application window vertical scroll widget due to XFCE DE shrinkage - xfce4-terminal

This is the same XFCE session clearly demonstrates the vertical shrinkage of XFCE session started as attachment for "20191015-081600+0000-UTC-1571127360-FreeBSD-11.3-STABLE-Bug-XFCE-Bug-FreeBSD-11.3-20191012-1458+0000-UTC-Upgrade-NoDEShrinkage.png".  Notice how the first character is cut off for each line of the terminal output.  I have taken screen shots of two other terminals that show the same DE shrinkage issue that can be added as attachments to this bug is so requested.  This attachment confirms the XFCE DE shrinkage issue.
